title: callitriche palustris subsp. polymorpha
intro: Callitriche palustris subsp. polymorpha, also known as bog starwort, is a submerged aquatic plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in alleviating symptoms of conditions such as bronchitis and gastritis. Bog starwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
